name: Rotary Foundation Scholarship (District/Global)
amount: Varies widely; Global Grant scholarship minimum $30,000; local awards $1,000–$5,000+

eligibility.citizenship: Varies by program; must reside in or near a Rotary district
eligibility.other_requirements: Must be sponsored by a local Rotary Club; for graduate-level Global Grants: studying in Rotary-defined area of focus; local awards vary by district

deadline: Varies by district; typically January 15 or March 1
stackable_notes: External awards; generally stackable. Grad students should note: Global Grants are competitive and require Rotary club sponsorship.
notes: This is an umbrella category — dozens of distinct programs exist at local, district, and international levels. The Global Grant Scholarships ($30,000+ minimum) fund graduate study in Rotary Areas of Focus (peace, disease prevention, water, education). Student must first contact local Rotary club for sponsorship.
